primary_text:
A new kind of grocery store.

Not a box scheme. Not a meal kit. A real grocery store where every product comes from a named regenerative farm.

50+ farms across NSW. Heritage pork from Bundarra. Wild-caught salmon from the South Coast. Bio-dynamic dairy from Meadows SA. 100% grass-fed beef.

No middlemen. No long supply chains. Collected fresh from your local hub.

Order what you want, when you want. No commitment, no lock-in.

We'll show you where your food comes from.
headline: A new kind of grocery store
description: 50+ regenerative farms. Fresh food collected from your nearest hub.
creative_brief: Clean brand statement on warm background. Simple product grid below: beef, salmon, dairy, pork. Each labelled with farm name. Confident, minimal.
